languages.text: Лорд-капитан наш{mf|ел|ла} не утраченную реликвию, а самого Себериана — живого и невредимого.

traits.locale_text: Лорд-капитан наш{mf|ел|ла} не утраченную реликвию, а самого Себериана — живого и невредимого.

languages.text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.
languages.original_text: Лорд-капитан наш{mf|ел|ла} не утраченную реликвию, а самого Себериана — живого и невредимого.

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.
The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.
The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.
The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

languages.text: Der Lord Captain hat kein verlorenes Relikt, sondern Seberian selbst gefunden ... lebendig und wohlauf.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain hat kein verlorenes Relikt, sondern Seberian selbst gefunden ... lebendig und wohlauf.

languages.text: Ce n'est pas une relique qu'a trouvé {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}, mais Seberian en personne, en vie et bien portant.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

traits.locale_text: Ce n'est pas une relique qu'a trouvé {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}, mais Seberian en personne, en vie et bien portant.

languages.text: 舰长大人找到的，不是什么失落的圣物，而是塞贝里安本人——而且他还活得好好的。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人找到的，不是什么失落的圣物，而是塞贝里安本人——而且他还活得好好的。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} no ha encontrado una reliquia, sino al propio Seberian, vivo y coleando.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} no ha encontrado una reliquia, sino al propio Seberian, vivo y coleando.

languages.text: 船長が見つけたのは失われた遺物ではなく、セベリアン自身だった。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

languages.text: Lord Kaptan kayıp bir yadigârı değil, Seberian'ın ta kendisini buldu... Hem de sağ salim.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has found not a lost relic, but Seberian himself — alive and well.

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan kayıp bir yadigârı değil, Seberian'ın ta kendisini buldu... Hem de sağ salim.
